channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 7 regole sul risk management che ogni CIO dovrebbe seguire
item.description: Il rischio è ineluttabile. Basta guardarsi intorno per vedere la grande quantità di ostacoli tecnologici, economici e competitivi che i CIO devono non solo gestire, ma anche oltrepassare.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Lunar Far Side Found to be Drier Than Expected - Scientists Report
item.description: Chinese scientists reveal that the lunar far side may be drier than previously thought, based on soil and rock samples returned from the moon's mysterious side.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shopify CEO: No new hires, unless you prove AI can't do the job
item.description: "Teams must demonstrate why they cannot get what they want done using AI," Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke wrote in a memo to employees.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, The Hill

item.title: Big San Jose industrial complex where hundreds could work pushes ahead
item.description: A big industrial complex in north San Jose that could accommodate hundreds of jobs has been approved.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft extends support for key Windows tool - but probably not the one you'd expect
item.description: Microsoft has taken the bold decision to postpone the removal of WSUS driver synchronization amid customer feedback.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google adds natural language query capabilities to AlloyDB
item.description: Google is enhancing AlloyDB, its fully managed database-as-a-service (DBaaS), to help developers build applications underpinned by generative AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Boston Dynamics' Atlas Robot Shows Off Breakdancing Moves - Impressive or Unsettling?
item.description: Boston Dynamics' latest video of Atlas, their bipedal robot, has blown up online with its mind-blowing human-like movements, including breakdancing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stop typing in the Start menu
item.description: The Windows Start menu isn’t the best search tool when it comes to professional productivity. Sure, it’s convenient — it’s better than clicking your way through the entire menu to find what you need. But more often than not, it mostly just gets in your way.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft Employees Fired Over Protests Condemning Company's Support for Israel - The Hill
item.description: Two Microsoft employees were fired after protesting the company's support for Israel at a 50th anniversary event, highlighting growing tensions within tech industries over human rights and government contracts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: GitHub Copilot rolls out agent mode in Visual Studio Code
item.description: GitHub has rolled out agent mode and MCP (Model Context Protocol) support in GitHub Copilot for all Visual Studio Code users. The company is also releasing an open source GitHub MCP server, allowing developers to add GitHub functionality to any LLM that supports MCP.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google, with potential breakup looming over its search monopoly, backs down from muzzling workers
item.description: Crucial hearings start this month in monopoly case against Google over its internet-search dominance.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: IRS acting commissioner is resigning over deal to send immigrants' tax data to ICE, AP sources say
item.description: The Internal Revenue Service’s acting commissioner is resigning over a deal to share immigrants’ tax data with Immigration and Customs Enforcement for the purpose of identifying and deporting people illegally in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple’s historic selloff has bulls balking from tariff risks
item.description: Apple shares dropped 19% in the wake of last week’s tariffs announcement, marking the worst three-day stretch for Apple since 2001.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: TikTok extension, potential deal may violate law: Top Senate Democrat
item.description: The top Democrat on the Senate Intelligence Committee warned Monday that President Trump’s additional extension for TikTok’s parent company to divest from the app, as well as a potential divestment deal on the table, may violate the law. In a letter to Trump, Sen. Mark Warner (D-Va.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Shopify CEO Tobi Lütke: AI is now a ‘fundamental expectation’ for employees
item.description: Shopify CEO Tobi Lütke shared an internal memo on X Monday that stressed the importance of using AI effectively in daily tasks. In fact, he wrote, using AI is now a “fundamental expectation” of Shopify employees.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 10 Java-based tools and frameworks for generative AI
item.description: Java is not the first language most programmers think of when they start projects involving artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). Many turn first to Python because of the large number of Python-based frameworks and tools for AI, ML, and data science.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amanda Nguyen to become first Vietnamese American woman in space
item.description: Nguyen will join Aisha Bowe, Gayle King, Katy Perry, Kerianne Flynn and Lauren Sánchez on an all-female flight.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: World’s first AI-powered industrial super-humanoid robot
item.description: Mech the super-humanoid robot can lift up to 132 pounds and is designed to tackle stressful and repetitive tasks that often lead to workplace injuries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to free up space on your Android
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy offers some of his easy expert tips to free up storage space on your Android if your device is running short on storage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took only seconds for the judges on a New York appeals court to realize that the man addressing them from a video screen — a person about to present an argument in a lawsuit — not only had no law degree, but didn't exist at all.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure
item.description: Researchers found the algorithms that rank pages in internet searches also can help planners understand how to prevent failures in electrical systems. The post How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: A look back at Microsoft’s IPO
item.description: On April 4, 2000, to celebrate Microsoft’s 25th anniversary, Network World’s Paul McNamara put together the post you’ll see below. The story hasn’t changed.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, ABC 4
